name: Crystalline Pinwheel Galaxy
description: You have been assigned the Crystalline Pinwheel Galaxy — an M101-class spiral unlike any other. At its heart, where a nucleus should blaze, sits a multi-faceted, iridescent prismatic crystal that refracts starlight into a prismatic rainbow, painting each spiral arm with every colour the cosmos can conceive.

attributes.value: Iridescent prismatic crystal nucleus refracting light into the arms
